exact_blocker: requirements-ci.lock is a deliberate pinned set with no per-package --hash entries; pip --require-hashes is therefore impossible. Generating hashes needs pip-compile --generate-hashes from a clean venv including the editable project build, which is a separate deliberate step (LEVEL_2). Not done here; not claimed.
claim: pinned versions only; NOT hash-locked, NOT hermetic, NOT supply-chain-sealed
